bits.premise: A predominantly white audience at a Houston comedy show resembles a segregated megachurch.
A Latino man's fear of ICE is undermined by the revelation that ICE now targets white people, collapsing his only safe hiding spot.
Performing an act of animal charity (rescuing cats) is reframed as a calculated seduction strategy.
A dog breed serves as a cross-racial bonding tool with older white men until their inherited racism abruptly ends the connection.

lines.text: Houston, Texas, how the fuck we feeling tonight?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: This is looking like a racist Lakewood Church, bro.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: What the fuck?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I heard that ICE is killing white people now, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: What's up with that?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You're telling me I can't even hide
lines.label: setup

lines.text: inside a Lulu lemon anymore?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: My girlfriend, when I met her,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: she was way out of my league,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so I found out everything I could about her, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I found out that she was really into animal rescue.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So 2019, fuck it, bro.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Rescue 34 cats, bro.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Fuck it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Sometimes you have to save the kitty to eat the kitty.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's what I was doing.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You can say I was in heat too, man.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Anyways, I have an Australian cattle dog,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: a blue healer at home.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I like to use that dog for small talk with older white guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I like a tractor supply.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I tell them I have a blue healer and they're like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Oh, my granddaddy had a blue heeler."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's a very intelligent dog.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's a very hard-working dog.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: - We have a beautiful moment,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and suddenly they remember that their granddaddy
lines.label: setup

lines.text: wouldn't like him talking to me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and that's the end of the conversation.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you.
lines.label: fluff
